notes: This file is generated by running `npm run ml-api-introspect`.
Mercado Libre exposes resource 'contracts' via HTTP OPTIONS on API paths (see official docs).
Crawling is best-effort: some paths require valid ids, some endpoints may be blocked by edge policies, and discovery quality depends on seeds + graph expansion.

values.name: Each attribute specifies a list of values

attributes.automatic_relist: Indicates if the item can be automatic relist

availability.end_date: Shows the end date of the item
availability.release_date: Shows the release date of the item
availability.start_date: Shows the start date of the item

attributes.available_quantity: Indicates the current stock the seller has available for sale in the listing
attributes.base_price: The base price of the item. Apply only to auctions

buying_mode.name: The buying mode of the listing the seller wants to use

attributes.catalog_listing: Specifies if the item is a catalog listing
attributes.catalog_product_id: Catalog product ID linked to the item
attributes.category_id: The category ID where the item was listed
attributes.channels: Indicates channels where the item is visible
attributes.coverage_areas: Coverage area where the seller provides the service. Applies only to services classifieds
attributes.currency_id: Currency ID in which the monetary amount is specified
attributes.deal_ids: List of deal IDs of the item

descriptions.name: List of sellers description and revisions

attributes.installments: Number of installments accepted by the differential price
attributes.payment_methods: Payment methods accepted by the differential price

attributes.domain_id: Domain ID the item belongs to
attributes.end_time: When the listing is scheduled to end
attributes.expiration_time: When the listing is scheduled to expire due to inactivity.
attributes.fee: Specifies item listing fee in local currency
attributes.health: Indicates a percentage of listing health. A value of 1 means all quality goals have been fulfilled.
attributes.initial_quantity: Indicates the stock available when the item was listed

listing_type_id.name: The listing type ID reflects the exposure of the item

location.name: Item location details. Currently only applies to classified items

non_mercado_pago_payment_methods.name: Other off-platform payment methods the seller accept

attributes.official_store_id: The official store id of the seller
attributes.original_price: The original price of the item. It will show when its bigger than the price

attributes.channel_settings: List of configurations by channel for this category
attributes.children_categories: List of subcategories that depends on this category
attributes.name: Name of the category
attributes.path_from_root: Path of categories from this level up to the root category

attributes.adult_content: Indicate if this category contains adult content

buyer_protection_programs.name: Indicates the buyer protection programs available for this category

attributes.buying_allowed: Indicate if it is possible to buy an item that belongs to this category

buying_modes.name: Buying modes allowed in this category

coverage_areas.name: Indicates if it is possible to set coverage areas for the items that belong to this category

attributes.immediate_payment: Indicates if online payment is mandatory for the items that belong to this category

item_conditions.name: Item conditions allowed for items that belongs to this category

attributes.item_reviews_allowed: Indicates if reviews can be made for items that belong to this category
attributes.listing_allowed: Indicates if items can be listed in this category
attributes.max_pictures_per_item: Maximum number of pictures that can have an item listed in this category
attributes.max_pictures_per_item_var: Maximum number of pictures per variation that can have an item listed in this category. This setting overrides max_pictures_per_item
attributes.max_variations_allowed: Maximum number of variations allowed in an item listed in this category
attributes.mirror_category: Indicates if there is a mirror category for this category
attributes.mirror_master_category: Indicates which is the mirror master category of this mirror slave category. Mirror categories are equivalent categories, with the same configurations, structure and items. Mirror master categories are the ones that receive changes in their configurations.
attributes.mirror_slave_categories: Indicates which are the mirror slave categories of this mirror master category. Mirror categories are equivalent categories, with the same configurations, structure and items. Mirror slave categories are copies of a mirror master category in other category trees.

price.name: Indicates if price is mandatory for the items that belong to this category

seller_contact.name: Indicates if seller contact information is mandatory for the items that belong to this category

shipping_options.name: Shipping options available for items that belong to this category

shipping_profile.name: Indicates if items that belong to this category have a shipping profile associated

attributes.show_contact_information: Indicates if seller contact information must be shown for items that belong to this category

simple_shipping.name: Indicates if the seller can add shipping information for posible locations

status.name: Indicates if items can be listed in this category

stock.name: Indicates if items that belong to this category can handle stock

attributes.total_items_in_this_category: Number of active items listed in this category or in one of his subcategories

availability.end_date: Shows the end date of the item

attributes.available_quantity: Indicates the current stock the seller has available for sale in the listing
attributes.base_price: The base price of the item. Apply only to auctions

attributes.channels: Indicates channels where the item is visible
attributes.coverage_areas: Coverage area where the seller provides the service. Applies only to services classifieds
attributes.currency_id: Currency ID in which the monetary amount is specified
attributes.deal_ids: List of deal IDs of the item

descriptions.name: List of sellers description and revisions

attributes.installments: Number of installments accepted by the differential price

attributes.domain_id: Domain ID the item belongs to
attributes.end_time: When the listing is scheduled to end
attributes.expiration_time: When the listing is scheduled to expire due to inactivity.
attributes.fee: Specifies item listing fee in local currency
attributes.health: Indicates a percentage of listing health. A value of 1 means all quality goals have been fulfilled.

listing_type_id.name: The listing type ID reflects the exposure of the item

location.name: Item location details. Currently only applies to classified items

non_mercado_pago_payment_methods.name: Other off-platform payment methods the seller accept

attributes.official_store_id: The official store id of the seller
attributes.original_price: The original price of the item. It will show when its bigger than the price
attributes.parent_item_id: Parent item ID of relisted item
attributes.permalink: The permanent link to the view item page

attributes.max_size: Maximum size without losing quality in width x heigth (pixels)

attributes.seller_custom_field: Seller custom field. Reserved for seller internal use

attributes.local_pick_up: Indicates if the buyer is able to pick up the items himself
attributes.store_pick_up: Indicates if the buyer is able to pick up the item at sellers store

attributes.site_id: The site ID where the item belongs
attributes.sold_quantity: The quantity of units already sold
attributes.start_time: When the listing is scheduled to active

attributes.not_yet_active: The item is waiting for activation
attributes.paused: The item was paused by the seller or other reason
attributes.payment_required: Requires the seller pays the listing fee before activation
attributes.under_review: The item is being reviewed by MercadoLibre

attributes.stop_time: When the listing was actually ended

attributes.deleted: The item was marked as deleted from MyML account
attributes.pending_documentation: Suspended until the seller send the documentation
attributes.waiting_for_patch: Suspended until the seller amends the item

attributes.subtitle: Subtitle
